ordered-sign classes (global sign flip + input swap):
  +++, ---
  +--, -++
  ++-, +-+, -+-, --+

orbit-sign classes (global sign flip + full mode permutation):
  +++, ---
  ++-, +-+, +--, -++, -+-, --+

triad=right_isosceles p=(1, 0, 0) q=(0, 1, 0) k=(1, 1, 0) area=1.000000
  signs=+++ coeff=+0.000000000000-0.603553390593j |coeff|=0.603553390593
  signs=++- coeff=+0.000000000000+0.103553390593j |coeff|=0.103553390593
  signs=+-+ coeff=+0.000000000000-0.603553390593j |coeff|=0.603553390593
  signs=+-- coeff=+0.000000000000+0.103553390593j |coeff|=0.103553390593
  signs=-++ coeff=+0.000000000000+0.103553390593j |coeff|=0.103553390593
  signs=-+- coeff=+0.000000000000-0.603553390593j |coeff|=0.603553390593
  signs=--+ coeff=+0.000000000000+0.103553390593j |coeff|=0.103553390593
  signs=--- coeff=+0.000000000000-0.603553390593j |coeff|=0.603553390593
  nonzero_sign_triples=8/8

triad=unequal_noncollinear p=(2, 0, 0) q=(0, 1, 0) k=(2, 1, 0) area=2.000000
  signs=+++ coeff=+0.000000000000-0.511667273602j |coeff|=0.511667273602

  signs=-+- coeff=+0.000000000000-0.511667273602j |coeff|=0.511667273602
  signs=--+ coeff=+0.000000000000+0.195439507585j |coeff|=0.195439507585
  signs=--- coeff=+0.000000000000-0.511667273602j |coeff|=0.511667273602
  nonzero_sign_triples=8/8

triad=generic_3d p=(1, 1, 0) q=(0, 1, 1) k=(1, 2, 1) area=1.732051
  signs=+++ coeff=+0.511032103265-0.625883947591j |coeff|=0.808012701892
  signs=++- coeff=+0.030136335851+0.049570907217j |coeff|=0.058012701892

  signs=-++ coeff=-0.036690454240-0.044936445659j |coeff|=0.058012701892
  signs=-+- coeff=+0.760433079191-0.273177704967j |coeff|=0.808012701892

triad=collinear p=(1, 0, 0) q=(2, 0, 0) k=(3, 0, 0) area=0.000000
  signs=+++ coeff=+0.000000000000-0.000000000000j |coeff|=0.000000000000
  signs=++- coeff=+0.000000000000-0.000000000000j |coeff|=0.000000000000
  signs=+-+ coeff=+0.000000000000-0.000000000000j |coeff|=0.000000000000

  signs=-+- coeff=+0.000000000000-0.000000000000j |coeff|=0.000000000000
  signs=--+ coeff=+0.000000000000-0.000000000000j |coeff|=0.000000000000
